notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Adrian Del Castillo out at 2nd. Nolan Arenado out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tim Tawa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tim Tawa singles on a line drive to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.

notableEvents.label: Tim Tawa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tim Tawa strikes out on a foul tip.
